name: Salad of Chicken & Melon
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut cantaloupe into chunks.
2. Halve and seed grapes.
3. Trim asparagus and cook until just tender (boil, steam, or microwave).
4. Cut cooked asparagus into 2-inch lengths.
5. Combine broth, wine, and garlic in a pan. Add chicken and bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes on each side, or until the chicken is tender.
7. Drain the chicken, cool it, and shred finely.
8. Combine shredded chicken, cantaloupe, grapes, cooked asparagus, and capers with dressing.
9. Serve with Parmesan cheese.
Dressing:
Combine all ingredients in a jar and shake well.
